title: Falcata bracteata
taxonomy: Falcata bracteata is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a member of the Apocynaceae family. Falcata bracteata is also known as a part of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.

intro: Falcata bracteata, commonly known as Falcata, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae.
